serverswitcher.screen.title: Quick join
serverswitcher.message.no_current_server: Reconnect is only available on a multiplayer server.
serverswitcher.config.title: Server Switcher
serverswitcher.config.panel_width.toolti: Width of the quick-join window in pixels.
serverswitcher.config.panel_height.toolt: Height of the quick-join window in pixels.
serverswitcher.config.row_height.tooltip: Height of each server row in the list.
When off, use the keybinding or open Settings from the quick-join screen.
serverswitcher.config.keys.hint: Assign "Open server switcher" in Minecraft controls (unbound by default).
